title: Dashboard and service runtime
description: Implement the dashboard with React, TypeScript, and Vite using the supplied static sample as the visual source, then add service-runtime support for Windows server and agent binaries.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard uses React, TypeScript, and Vite.
Dashboard preserves the supplied sample theme and dense server table layout.
Dashboard consumes existing server API routes for agents and metrics.
Dashboard has focused tests for status mapping and summary counts.
Server and agent have a clear path to run foreground or under Windows Service Control Manager.
Documentation, changelog, and module version are updated.

tasks.title: Scaffold React dashboard
tasks.description: Create dashboard package metadata, Vite config, TypeScript config, source files, styles, and tests using the supplied sample theme.

unit: Test health classification and summary count behavior.

tasks.implementation_notes: Work under C:/dev/TheWatcher/dashboard. Keep the sample visual language from dashboard/public/server_page_sample.html and call /api/agents plus /api/metrics.

tasks.title: Add Windows service runtime
tasks.description: Add foreground/service run modes and service install/uninstall commands for the server and agent binaries.
acceptance_criteria: Windows service mode is explicit through --service.
Install/uninstall commands document the generated service command line.

unit: Compile-time coverage through existing Bazel targets.

tasks.implementation_notes: Prefer shared helpers under common when possible. Windows service control uses SCM APIs and links advapi32.lib only on Windows.
